chapter_title.en: Chapter 113 – Clearing the womb of the slave girl

text: فِي الرَّجُلِ يَشْتَرِي الْأَمَةَ مِنْ رَجُلٍ فَيَقُولُ إِنِّي لَمْ أَطَأْهَا فَقَالَ إِنْ وَثِقَ بِهِ فَلَا بَأْسَ بِأَنْ يَأْتِيَهَا وَ قَالَ فِي رَجُلٍ يَبِيعُ الْأَمَةَ مِنْ رَجُلٍ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَسْتَبْرِئَ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَبِيعَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding the man who bought the slave girl from a man, so he was saying, ‘I did not sleep with her’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he can be trusted with it, so there is no problem if he were to go to her’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who sells the slave girl to a man, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is that he clears her womb before he sells her’.
